reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool but response did not include a GitHub username due to connection propagation issue
  Bugs found:
    - GitHub account access was granted through the UI, but the OAuth token did not fully propagate to the session - the agent reported "CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS is empty" and "Bad credentials" error when attempting the GET /user API call
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — page loaded successfully with agents list visible
Clicked agent "QA-20260429-162032-crq1" in sidebar — agent detail view opened, showing status "idle"
Verified agent status — status indicator showed "idle" (confirmed)
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — message input field populated with text
Clicked Send button — message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", session "GitHub Username Verification Request" created
Account Access Request card appeared — card displayed with GitHub account already selected
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button — GitHub account access granted, agent resumed "working"
API Request Review card appeared (GET /user) — card showed GitHub service and permission request
Clicked "Allow" button first time — permission dialog appeared with "Allow Once" option active
Clicked "Allow Once" button first time — dialog closed, agent resumed "working"
Second API Request Review card appeared — card showed same GitHub GET /user request
Clicked "Allow" button second time — permission dialog appeared again
Clicked "Allow Once" button second time — dialog closed, agent resumed "working"
Third API Request Review card appeared — card showed third attempt at GET /user API call
Clicked "Allow" button third time — permission dialog appeared again
Clicked "Allow Once" button third time — dialog closed, agent resumed "working"
Fourth API Request Review card appeared — card showed fourth attempt at GET /user API call
Clicked "Allow" button fourth time — permission dialog appeared again
Clicked "Allow Once" button fourth time — dialog closed, agent resumed "working"
Waited for response — agent completed after 2m 11s, status changed back to "idle"
Verified response content — response states "GitHub connection didn't fully propagate - CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS is empty and proxy returns Bad credentials" - NO GitHub username was returned
Took screenshot — captured final chat state showing error message instead of GitHub username
bugs: GitHub account access was granted through the UI, but the OAuth token did not fully propagate to the session - the agent reported "CONNECTED_ACCOUNTS is empty" and "Bad credentials" error when attempting the GET /user API call
